mapper.select: SELECT /*MspMapper.findPhoneMspDto 단품모델ID로 핸드폰정보를 조회한다. */ A.PRDT_ID, A.RPRS_PRDT_ID, A.RPRS_YN, A.PRDT_NM, A.PRDT_CODE, A.PRDT_TYPE_CD, A.PRDT_IND_CD, A.PRDT_COLR_CD, A.MNFCT_ID, A.PRDT_LNCH_DT, A.PRDT_DT FROM CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP A WHERE A.PRDT_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId}

/*MspMapper.listOrgnMnfctMstRe MSP 에서 제조사/공급사 정보를 조회한다. */ SELECT DISTINCT MAKR_CD AS MNFCT_ID , MNFCT_NM AS MNFCT_NM FROM NMCP_PROD_BAS T1 , ORG_MNFCT_MST@DL_MSP T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.MAKR_CD =T2.MNFCT_ID AND T1.SHOW_YN ='Y' AND T1.SALE_YN ='Y' AND T2.MNFCT_YN ='Y' AND T1.PROD_TYPE = #{prodType} ORDER BY DECODE(MAKR_CD ,'0141',1,'0142',2,'0222',3,MAKR_CD)

/*MspMapper.findMspRateMst 해당정책코드에 해당하는 판매요금제 정보 조회 */ SELECT RATE_CD, APPL_END_DT, APPL_STRT_DT, RATE_NM, RATE_GRP_CD, PAY_CL_CD, RATE_TYPE, DATA_TYPE, BASE_AMT, FREE_CALL_CL_CD, FREE_CALL_CNT, NW_IN_CALL_CNT, NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, FREE_SMS_CNT, FREE_DATA_CNT, RMK, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, ONLINE_TYPE_CD, AL_FLAG, SERVICE_TYPE, CMNT FROM ( SELECT RA.RATE_CD, --요금제코드 RA.APPL_END_DT, --적용종료일자 RA.APPL_STRT_DT, --적용시작일자 RA.RATE_NM, --요금제명 RA.RATE_GRP_CD, --요금제그룹코드 RA.PAY_CL_CD, --선후불구분 RA.RATE_TYPE, --요금제유형( ORG0008 ) RA.DATA_TYPE, --데이터유형( ORG0018 ) RA.BASE_AMT, --기본료 RA.FREE_CALL_CL_CD, --망내외무료통화구분 RA.FREE_CALL_CNT, --무료통화건수 RA.NW_IN_CALL_CNT, --망내무료통화건수 RA.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, --망외무료통화건수 RA.FREE_SMS_CNT, --무료문자건수 RA.FREE_DATA_CNT, --무료데이터건수 RA.RMK, --비고 RA.REGST_ID, --등록자ID RA.REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 RA.RVISN_ID, --수정자ID RA.RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 RA.ONLINE_TYPE_CD, --온라인유형코드 RA.AL_FLAG, --알요금제 구분자 RA.SERVICE_TYPE, --서비스유형 RA.CMNT -- 요금제혜택 FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP RA, MSP_SALE_RATE_MST@DL_MSP SA, CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP GR WHERE APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND RA.PAY_CL_CD = GR.CD_VAL AND GR.GRP_ID='CMN0032' --선불후불 구분 코트값의 그룹코드 AND RA.RATE_CD = SA.RATE_CD AND SA.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND RA.PAY_CL_CD = #{payClCd} ORDER BY BASE_AMT ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/*MspMapper.listMspSaleAgrmMst 해당정책코드에 해당하는 약정개월정보(무약정 포함) 리스트 조회 */ SELECT RA.SALE_PLCY_CD, RA.AGRM_TRM, RA.REGST_ID, RA.REGST_DTTM, RA.RVISN_ID, RA.RVISN_DTTM, RA.AGRM_TRM FROM MSP_SALE_AGRM_MST@DL_MSP RA WHERE RA.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} ORDER BY RA.AGRM_TRM

/*MspMapper.listMspSaleAgrmMst 해당정책코드에 해당하는 약정개월정보 리스트 조회 */ SELECT RA.SALE_PLCY_CD, RA.AGRM_TRM, RA.REGST_ID, RA.REGST_DTTM, RA.RVISN_ID, RA.RVISN_DTTM, ORG.INST_NOM FROM MSP_SALE_AGRM_MST@DL_MSP RA, ORG_INST_NOM_MST@DL_MSP ORG WHERE RA.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND ORG.SALE_PLCY_CD = RA.SALE_PLCY_CD AND ORG.INST_NOM = RA.AGRM_TRM AND ORG.INST_NOM != 0 ORDER BY INST_NOM

/*MspMapper.listMspSaleAgrmMst 해당정책코드에 해당하는 약정개월정보 리스트 조회 */ SELECT RA.SALE_PLCY_CD, RA.AGRM_TRM, RA.REGST_ID, RA.REGST_DTTM, RA.RVISN_ID, RA.RVISN_DTTM, ORG.INST_NOM FROM MSP_SALE_AGRM_MST@DL_MSP RA, ORG_INST_NOM_MST@DL_MSP ORG WHERE RA.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND ORG.SALE_PLCY_CD = RA.SALE_PLCY_CD AND ORG.INST_NOM = RA.AGRM_TRM ORDER BY INST_NOM

SELECT PL.SALE_PLCY_CD , --판매정책코드 PL.SALE_PLCY_NM, --판매정책명 PL.SALE_STRT_DTTM, --판매시작일시 PL.SALE_END_DTTM, --판매종료일시 PL.PLCY_TYPE_CD, --정책유형코드 M:오프라인, O:온라인 PL.ORGN_TYPE, --조직유형 PL.PLCY_SCTN_CD, --정책구분코드 01:단말, 02:USIM PL.PRDT_SCTN_CD, --제품구분코 02:3G, 03:LTE PL.APPL_SCTN_CD, --적용구분코드 O:개통일, R:접수일 PL.INST_RATE, --할부이자율 PL.NEW_YN, --신규여부 PL.MNP_YN, --번호이동여부 PL.HCN_YN, --기변여부 PL.HDN_YN, --우수기변여부 PL.CNFM_YN, --확정여부 PL.CNFM_ID, --확정자ID PL.CNFM_DTTM, --확정일시 PL.REGST_ID, --등록자ID PL.REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 PL.RVISN_ID, --수정자ID PL.RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 PL.SPRT_TP --지원금유형 FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST@DL_MSP PL WHERE PL.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}
SELECT GRP_ID, CD_VAL, CD_DSC, USG_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, ETC1, ETC2, ETC3, ETC4, ETC5, ETC6 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = #{grpId} AND CD_VAL = #{cdVal}

SELECT DISTINCT RATE_MST.RATE_CD, RATE_MST.APPL_END_DT, RATE_MST.APPL_STRT_DT, RATE_MST.RATE_NM, RATE_MST.RATE_GRP_CD, RATE_MST.PAY_CL_CD, RATE_MST.RATE_TYPE, RATE_MST.DATA_TYPE, RATE_MST.BASE_AMT, RATE_MST.FREE_CALL_CL_CD, RATE_MST.FREE_CALL_CNT, RATE_MST.NW_IN_CALL_CNT, RATE_MST.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, RATE_MST.FREE_SMS_CNT, RATE_MST.FREE_DATA_CNT, RATE_MST.RMK, RATE_MST.ONLINE_TYPE_CD, RATE_MST.AL_FLAG, RATE_MST.CMNT, -- 요금제혜택 RATE_MST.SERVICE_TYPE FROM MSP_SALE_ORGN_MST@DL_MSP ORGN, MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST@DL_MSP PLCY, MSP_SALE_RATE_MST@DL_MSP RATE, MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP RATE_MST WHERE ORGN.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') BETWEEN PLCY.SALE_STRT_DTTM AND PLCY.SALE_END_DTTM --판매기간 (필수) AND PLCY.CNFM_YN = 'Y' AND SPRT_TP = #{sprtTp} AND PLCY.PLCY_SCTN_CD = #{plcySctnCd} AND PLCY.PRDT_SCTN_CD = #{prdtSctnCd} AND ORGN.SALE_PLCY_CD = PLCY.SALE_PLCY_CD AND PLCY.SALE_PLCY_CD = RATE.SALE_PLCY_CD AND RATE_MST.RATE_CD = RATE.RATE_CD AND RATE_TYPE != '02' ORDER BY RATE_MST.RATE_NM

SELECT PL.SALE_PLCY_CD , --판매정책코드 PL.SALE_PLCY_NM, --판매정책명 PL.SALE_STRT_DTTM, --판매시작일시 PL.SALE_END_DTTM, --판매종료일시 PL.PLCY_TYPE_CD, --정책유형코드 M:오프라인, O:온라인 PL.ORGN_TYPE, --조직유형 PL.PLCY_SCTN_CD, --정책구분코드 01:단말, 02:USIM PL.PRDT_SCTN_CD, --제품구분코 02:3G, 03:LTE PL.APPL_SCTN_CD, --적용구분코드 O:개통일, R:접수일 PL.INST_RATE, --할부이자율 PL.NEW_YN, --신규여부 PL.MNP_YN, --번호이동여부 PL.HCN_YN, --기변여부 PL.HDN_YN, --우수기변여부 PL.CNFM_YN, --확정여부 PL.CNFM_ID, --확정자ID PL.CNFM_DTTM, --확정일시 PL.REGST_ID, --등록자ID PL.REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 PL.RVISN_ID, --수정자ID PL.RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 PL.SPRT_TP --지원금유형 FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST@DL_MSP PL WHERE PL.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') BETWEEN PL.SALE_STRT_DTTM AND PL.SALE_END_DTTM --판매기간 (필수) AND PL.CNFM_YN = 'Y'

SELECT /*MspMapper.listMspSalePrdtMstBySalePlcyCd 정책에 해당하는 상품의 상세정보를 가져온다.*/ CMN.PRDT_ID, CMN.RPRS_PRDT_ID, CMN.RPRS_YN, CMN.PRDT_NM, CMN.PRDT_CODE, CMN.PRDT_TYPE_CD, CMN.PRDT_IND_CD, CMN.PRDT_COLR_CD, CMN.MNFCT_ID, CMN.PRDT_LNCH_DT, CMN.PRDT_DT, CMN.REG_ID, CMN.REG_DTTM, CMN.RVISN_ID, CMN.RVISN_DTTM, SALE.SALE_PLCY_CD, SALE.PRDT_ID AS S_PRDT_ID, SALE.OLD_YN, SALE.NEW_CMSN_AMT, SALE.MNP_CMSN_AMT, SALE.HCN_CMSN_AMT FROM MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST@DL_MSP SALE INNER JOIN CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP CMN ON SALE.PRDT_ID = CMN.PRDT_ID WHERE SALE.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}

SELECT /*MspMapper.listMspRateNm 요금제 목록을 가져온다.*/ DISTINCT A.RATE_CD, B.RATE_NM, B.DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP A, MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT AND B.RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD ORDER BY RATE_CD

SELECT /*MspMapper.listMspOfficialNoticeSupport 공시지원금 목록을 가져온다.*/ DECODE(B.PRDT_IND_CD , '03', '3G' , '04', 'LTE', '45', '5G', '08', '5G') AS PRDT_IND_CD -- 단말구분 ,B.PRDT_NM -- 모델명 ,A.RATE_NM -- 요금제 ,D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC -- 출고가 ,C.SUBSD_AMT -- 공시지원금 ,CASE WHEN D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC - C.SUBSD_AMT< 0 THEN 0 ELSE D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC - C.SUBSD_AMT END AS PRIC_AMT -- 판매가 ,C.APPL_STRT_DT -- 공시일 FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A ,CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP B ,(SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN, A.SUBSD_AMT, A.APPL_STRT_DT, A.APPL_END_DT FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP A WHERE to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT and a.PRDT_ID not in ( select dtl_cd from NMCP_CD_DTL where cd_group_id ='OFCLLIST' and use_yn ='Y' ) GROUP BY A.RATE_CD, A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN, A.SUBSD_AMT, A.APPL_STRT_DT, A.APPL_END_DT ) C , (SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID, OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 AS OUT_UNIT_PRIC FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT@DL_MSP A WHERE to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmddHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM ) D WHERE A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND B.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID AND C.PRDT_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND B.PRDT_DT > to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') AND A.RATE_CD NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9019' AND USG_YN = 'Y')
AND B.PRDT_IND_CD in ('45', '08')
AND B.PRDT_IND_CD = #{prdtIndCd} -- 단말유형LTE, 3G
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '3G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'LTE'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '5G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = DECODE(B.PRDT_IND_CD,'45', '5G', '08', '5G')
AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} -- 요금제
AND (UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(B.PRDT_NM)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{prdtNm}) || '%' || '%' ESCAPE '!') --모델명으로 검색
ORDER BY
C.SUBSD_AMT DESC,
C.SUBSD_AMT ASC,
PRIC_AMT DESC,
PRIC_AMT ASC,
C.SUBSD_AMT DESC,PRIC_AMT DESC,
C.SUBSD_AMT DESC,PRIC_AMT ASC,
C.SUBSD_AMT ASC,PRIC_AMT DESC,
C.SUBSD_AMT ASC,PRIC_AMT ASC,
B.PRDT_IND_CD DESC , B.PRDT_NM, A.RATE_NM

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A ,CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP B ,(SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.PRDT_ID FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP A WHERE to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT and a.PRDT_ID not in ( select dtl_cd from NMCP_CD_DTL where cd_group_id ='OFCLLIST' and use_yn ='Y' ) GROUP BY A.RATE_CD, A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN, A.SUBSD_AMT, A.APPL_STRT_DT, A.APPL_END_DT ) C , (SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT@DL_MSP A WHERE to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmddHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM ) D WHERE A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND B.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID AND C.PRDT_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND B.PRDT_DT > to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') AND A.RATE_CD NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9019' AND USG_YN = 'Y')
AND (UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(B.PRDT_NM)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{prdtNm}) || '%' || '%' ESCAPE '!') --모델명으로 검색
AND B.PRDT_IND_CD in ('45', '08')
AND B.PRDT_IND_CD = #{prdtIndCd} -- 단말유형LTE, 3G
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '3G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'LTE'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '5G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = DECODE(B.PRDT_IND_CD,'45', '5G', '08', '5G')
AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} -- 요금제

SELECT /*MspMapper.getCustomerSsn 계약번호의 주민번호.*/ CUSTOMER_SSN FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP T1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND T1.CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD IN ('01','05') AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
SELECT /*MspMapper.sellUsimMgmtCount */ COUNT(*) FROM MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST@DL_MSP WHERE USIM_NO = #{searchUsimNo}
SELECT /*MspMapper.sellUsimMgmtOrgnId */ ORGN_ID FROM MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST@DL_MSP WHERE USIM_NO = #{searchUsimNo}

/*MspMapper.getMspRatemst 요금제 정보 리스트 조회 */ SELECT RA.RATE_CD, --요금제코드 RA.APPL_END_DT, --적용종료일자 RA.APPL_STRT_DT, --적용시작일자 RA.RATE_NM, --요금제명 RA.RATE_GRP_CD, --요금제그룹코드 RA.PAY_CL_CD, --선후불구분 RA.RATE_TYPE, --요금제유형( ORG0008 ) RA.DATA_TYPE, --데이터유형( ORG0018 ) RA.BASE_AMT, --기본료 RA.FREE_CALL_CL_CD, --망내외무료통화구분 RA.FREE_CALL_CNT, --무료통화건수 RA.NW_IN_CALL_CNT, --망내무료통화건수 RA.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, --망외무료통화건수 RA.FREE_SMS_CNT, --무료문자건수 RA.FREE_DATA_CNT, --무료데이터건수 RA.RMK, --비고 RA.REGST_ID, --등록자ID RA.REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 RA.RVISN_ID, --수정자ID RA.RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 RA.ONLINE_TYPE_CD, --온라인유형코드 RA.AL_FLAG, --알요금제 구분자 RA.SERVICE_TYPE, --서비스유형 RA.CMNT, --요금제혜택 RA.JEHU_PROD_TYPE --요금제제휴처 FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP RA WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd}
SELECT /*MspMapper.juoSubIngoCount */ COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'

/*MspMapper.listMspSaleMst 할인금액을 조회..*/ SELECT A.RATE_CD , B.RATE_NM , A.AGRM_TRM , NVL(A.TM_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT , NVL(A.SP_AMT, 0) AS ADD_DC_AMT FROM ( SELECT RATE_CD , AGRM_TRM , SUM(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'KD', NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0))) AS TM_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'PM', NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0))) AS RT_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'SM', NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0))) AS SP_AMT , MAX(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'PM', A.APPL_STRT_DTTM, 'SM', A.APPL_STRT_DTTM)) AS APPL_STRT_DTTM , MAX(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'PM', A.APPL_END_DTTM, 'SM', A.APPL_END_DTTM)) AS APPL_END_DTTM FROM MSP_RATE_SPEC@DL_MSP A WHERE A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')|| '000000' BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DTTM AND A.APPL_END_DTTM GROUP BY A.RATE_CD, A.AGRM_TRM ) A , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND AGRM_TRM =#{agrmTrm}

SELECT PL.SALE_PLCY_CD , --판매정책코드 PL.SALE_PLCY_NM, --판매정책명 PL.SALE_STRT_DTTM, --판매시작일시 PL.SALE_END_DTTM, --판매종료일시 PL.PLCY_TYPE_CD, --정책유형코드 M:오프라인, O:온라인 PL.ORGN_TYPE, --조직유형 PL.PLCY_SCTN_CD, --정책구분코드 01:단말, 02:USIM PL.PRDT_SCTN_CD, --제품구분코 02:3G, 03:LTE PL.APPL_SCTN_CD, --적용구분코드 O:개통일, R:접수일 PL.INST_RATE, --할부이자율 PL.NEW_YN, --신규여부 PL.MNP_YN, --번호이동여부 PL.HCN_YN, --기변여부 PL.HDN_YN, --우수기변여부 PL.CNFM_YN, --확정여부 PL.CNFM_ID, --확정자ID PL.CNFM_DTTM, --확정일시 PL.REGST_ID, --등록자ID PL.REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 PL.RVISN_ID, --수정자ID PL.RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 PL.SPRT_TP --지원금유형 FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST@DL_MSP PL WHERE PL.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}

/*MspMapper.findMspSaleSubsdMst 상품의 판매금액관련 상세내역을 조회 한다.*/ SELECT SALE_PLCY_CD, --판매정책코드 RATE_CD, --요금제코드 PRDT_ID, --제품ID OLD_YN, --중고여부 AGRM_TRM, --약정기간 OPER_TYPE, --업무유형 ORGN_ID, --조직ID HNDST_AMT, --단말금액(VAT포함) SUBSD_AMT, --공시지원금(VAT포함) INST_AMT, --할부원금(VAT포함) INST_CMSN, --할부수수료(VAT포함) AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX, --대리점보조금MAX(VAT포함) AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, --대리점보조금(VAT포함) REGST_ID, --등록자ID REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 RVISN_ID, --수정자ID RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 SPRT_TP, --지원금유형 BASE_AMT, --기본료 DC_AMT, --기본할인금액 ADD_DC_AMT --추가할인금액 FROM MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} --상품ID AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} --중고여부 AND AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} --약정기간 AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND OPER_TYPE = #{operType} --가입유형 AND ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} --조직코드 AND SPRT_TP =#{sprtTp} --할인유형 (단말,요금)

SELECT NVL(SUM(RANTAL),0) FROM ( SELECT CEIL(-RANTAL * 1.1) AS RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP A , MCP_ADDITION B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} --접점코드
AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('MM','AL')
AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL')
AND 1 = 0
AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y'
AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y'
AND 1 = 0
AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y'
AND A.NAC_YN = 'Y'
AND 1 = 0
AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType} --온라인오프라인구분 AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' )

/*MspMapper.selectMspSaleSubsdMstListWithRateInfo 최저가를 구하기 위한 해당 상품의 요금제 정보 리스트를 조회 한다..*/ SELECT SALE_PLCY_CD , RATE_CD_SU , PRDT_ID , OLD_YN , AGRM_TRM , OPER_TYPE , ORGN_ID , HNDST_AMT , SUBSD_AMT , INST_AMT , INST_CMSN , AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX , AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , REGST_ID_SU , REGST_DTTM_SU , RVISN_ID_SU , SPRT_TP , DC_AMT , ADD_DC_AMT , RATE_CD_RA , APPL_END_DT , APPL_STRT_DT , RATE_NM , RATE_GRP_CD , PAY_CL_CD , RATE_TYPE , DATA_TYPE , BASE_AMT , FREE_CALL_CL_CD , FREE_CALL_CNT , NW_IN_CALL_CNT , NW_OUT_CALL_CNT , FREE_SMS_CNT , FREE_DATA_CNT
, RMK
, REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , ONLINE_TYPE_CD , AL_FLAG , CMNT , SERVICE_TYPE , PLCY_SCTN_CD , ON_OFF_TYPE , PAY_SORT FROM ( SELECT SU.SALE_PLCY_CD, --판매정책코드 SU.RATE_CD AS RATE_CD_SU, --요금제코드 SU.PRDT_ID, --제품ID SU.OLD_YN, --중고여부 SU.AGRM_TRM, --약정기간 SU.OPER_TYPE, --업무유형 SU.ORGN_ID, --조직ID SU.HNDST_AMT, --단말금액(VAT포함) SU.SUBSD_AMT, --공시지원금(VAT포함) SU.INST_AMT, --할부원금(VAT포함) SU.INST_CMSN, --할부수수료(VAT포함) SU.AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX, --대리점보조금MAX(VAT포함) SU.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, --대리점보조금(VAT포함) SU.REGST_ID AS REGST_ID_SU, --등록자ID SU.REGST_DTTM AS REGST_DTTM_SU, --등록일시 SU.RVISN_ID AS RVISN_ID_SU, --수정자ID SU.RVISN_DTTM AS RVISN_DTTM_SU, --수정일시 SU.SPRT_TP, --지원금유형 SU.DC_AMT, --기본할인금액 SU.ADD_DC_AMT, --추가할인금액 RA.RATE_CD AS RATE_CD_RA, --요금제코드 RA.APPL_END_DT, --적용종료일자 RA.APPL_STRT_DT, --적용시작일자 RA.RATE_NM, --요금제명 RA.RATE_GRP_CD, --요금제그룹코드 RA.PAY_CL_CD, --선후불구분 RA.RATE_TYPE, --요금제유형( ORG0008 ) RA.DATA_TYPE, --데이터유형( ORG0018 ) RA.BASE_AMT, --기본료 RA.FREE_CALL_CL_CD, --망내외무료통화구분 RA.FREE_CALL_CNT, --무료통화건수 RA.NW_IN_CALL_CNT, --망내무료통화건수 RA.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, --망외무료통화건수 RA.FREE_SMS_CNT, --무료문자건수 RA.FREE_DATA_CNT, --무료데이터건수
RA.RMK, --비고
RA.REGST_ID, --등록자ID RA.REGST_DTTM, --등록일시 RA.RVISN_ID, --수정자ID RA.RVISN_DTTM, --수정일시 RA.ONLINE_TYPE_CD, --온라인유형코드 RA.AL_FLAG, --알요금제 구분자 RA.CMNT, -- 요금제혜택 RA.SERVICE_TYPE , --서비스유형 #{plcySctnCd} AS PLCY_SCTN_CD ,--정책구분코드(01:단말,02:유심) #{onOffType} AS ON_OFF_TYPE , NVL(PAY_SORT,'9999') PAY_SORT -- 관리자 정렬 기준 FROM MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP SU , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP RA , ( SELECT * FROM MCP_USIM_PROD_SORT WHERE 1=1
AND SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}
AND 1 = 0
AND PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} ) PR WHERE 1=1 AND SU.RATE_CD = RA.RATE_CD AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN RA.APPL_STRT_DT AND RA.APPL_END_DT -- 요금제 기간 AND RA.RATE_CD = PR.RATE_CD(+)
AND SU.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} --정책코드 할인유형과 결합시 유니크
AND RA.PAY_CL_CD = #{payClCd}
AND SU.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} --상품ID AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} --중고여부 AND ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} --조직코드
AND OPER_TYPE = #{operType} --가입유형
AND SU.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드
AND AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm}
AND (AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} or AGRM_TRM = '0') -- 약정기간 무약정0은 기본적으로 조회한다.
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT DTL_CD FROM MCP_MNG.NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'RATELIMIT' AND EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 = '0' AND EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 ='999' AND EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 ='N' AND DTL_CD = SU.RATE_CD )
)A WHERE 1=1
AND ( (AGRM_TRM='0'AND RATE_TYPE='02') OR (AGRM_TRM !='0' and RATE_TYPE='01') OR RATE_TYPE='00' )
ORDER BY RATE_NM

/*Phone_Query.selectMspSaleSubsdMstListForLowPrice 최저가를 구하기 위한 해당 상품의 요금제 정보 리스트를 조회 한다..*/ SELECT HNDST_AMT, --단말금액(VAT포함) SUBSD_AMT, --공시지원금(VAT포함) INST_AMT, --할부원금(VAT포함) INST_CMSN, --할부수수료(VAT포함) AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX, --대리점보조금MAX(VAT포함) AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, --대리점보조금(VAT포함) SPRT_TP, --지원금유형 BASE_AMT, --기본료 DC_AMT, --기본할인금액 ADD_DC_AMT, --추가할인금액 RATE_CD, PRDT_ID , AGRM_TRM FROM MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1
AND SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} --정책코드 할인유형과 결합시 유니크
AND PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} --상품ID
AND ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} --조직코드
AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} --중고여부
AND OPER_TYPE = #{operType} --가입유형
AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd}
AND AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} -- 약정기간 무약정0은 기본적으로 조회한다.
AND (AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} or AGRM_TRM = '0') -- 약정기간 무약정0은 기본적으로 조회한다.
mapper.update: UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP T1 SET SCAN_ID = ( SELECT T2.SCAN_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CONTRACT_NUM= T2.CONTRACT_NUM ) WHERE T1.SCAN_ID = '999999'
UPDATE MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T1 SET SCAN_ID = ( SELECT T2.SCAN_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CONTRACT_NUM= T2.CONTRACT_NUM ) WHERE T1.SCAN_ID = '999999'
mapper.select: /*MspMapper.selectMspCombRateMapp 결합요금제에 따른 부가서비스 코드조회 */ SELECT COMB.P_RATE_CD -- 요금제코드 ,COMB.R_RATE_CD -- 부가서비스코드 ,(SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE SERVICE_TYPE='R' AND RATE_CD = COMB.R_RATE_CD) AS R_RATE_NM ,(SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE SERVICE_TYPE='P' AND RATE_CD = #{pRateCd}) AS P_RATE_NM FROM MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP@DL_MSP COMB WHERE 1=1 AND COMB.P_RATE_CD = #{pRateCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN COMB.APP_START_DT AND COMB.APP_END_DT AND ROWNUM =1
SELECT count(*) FROM CMN_USR_MST@DL_MSP WHERE USR_ID = #{adminId}

SELECT NVL(SUM(RANTAL),0) FROM ( SELECT CEIL(-T4.RANTAL * 1.1) AS RANTAL FROM MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT@DL_MSP T1 , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_RATE@DL_MSP T2 , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_ADD@DL_MSP T3 , MCP_ADDITION T4 WHERE T1.PRMT_ID = T2.PRMT_ID AND T1.PRMT_ID = T3.PRMT_ID AND T1.PRMT_ID = T3.PRMT_ID AND T3.SOC = T4.SOC AND T1.USG_YN = 'Y' AND T2.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(T1.STRT_DT,'YYYYMMDD') AND (TO_DATE(T1.END_DT,'YYYYMMDD')+1) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP
AND CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND SUB_STATUS = 'A'
SELECT A.SOC , B.SERVICE_TYPE FROM MSP_DIS_ADD@DL_MSP A , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}
mapper.update: /* MspMapper.updateApiTrace */ UPDATE MSP_API_TRACE@DL_MSP SET RES_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), RES_CD = #{resCd}, RES_MSG = #{resMsg}, RES_STR = #{resStr}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TR_SEQ = #{trSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT SUB_STATUS FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT STATUS FROM ( SELECT DECODE(STATUS,'사용중','Y','N') STATUS FROM MDS_INET_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND INTERNET_ID = #{internetId} AND TO_DATE(OPEN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TO_DATE(#{openDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM =1
SELECT RATE_CD, RATE_NM, BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'P'

SELECT B.SOC_CODE, A.RATE_NM, A.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A, MCP_FQC_PLCY_PLA B WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = B.SOC_CODE AND B.FQC_PLCY_CD = #{fqcPlcyCd} AND TO_DATE(STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') <= SYSDATE AND TO_DATE(END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') >= SYSDATE

/*MspMapper.getAcenVocAgntListByOrgnId*/ SELECT B.MBLPHN_NUM FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_AGNT A ,CMN_USR_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.VOC_AGNT_ID = B.USR_ID AND A.VOC_AGNT_CD = #{vocAgntCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S')
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NMCP_MON_USE_RATE_INFO ( BASE_MON , OPEN_DT , GENDER , AGE , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , STATUS , CRET_DT , CONTRACT_NUM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN),7,1) IN ('2','4','6','8') THEN 'F' ELSE 'M' END AS GENDER , FN_GET_AGE_JAVA@DL_MSP(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN)) , B.LST_RATE_CD , C.RATE_NM , A.SUB_STATUS , SYSDATE , A.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP A , MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP B , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.LST_RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN #{strtDt} AND #{endDt} AND B.LST_RATE_CD IS NOT NULL AND (A.SUB_STATUS IN ('A','S') OR (A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') > 14))
mapper.select: SELECT SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(SUB.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(SUB.USER_SSN), 1, 6) ELSE '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(SUB.USER_SSN), 1, 6) END AS BIRTH , SUB.GENDER , SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , MRD.FST_RATE_CD , MRD.FST_RATE_NM , MCRM.R_RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM@DL_MSP(MCRM.R_RATE_CD) AS R_RATE_NM , SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , MR.REQUEST_KEY FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP MRD , MCP_REQUEST MR , MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP@DL_MSP MCRM WHERE SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE > SYSDATE - #{baseDate} AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = MRD.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = MR.CONTRACT_NUM AND MR.COMBINE_SOLO_TYPE = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQ_COMBINE MRC WHERE MRC.COMB_TYPE_CD = '04' AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MR.REQUEST_KEY ) AND MRD.FST_RATE_CD = MCRM.P_RATE_CD (+) AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN MCRM.APP_START_DT (+) AND MCRM.APP_END_DT (+)
